title: Too Young to Die! Wakakushite shinu
original_title: TOO YOUNG TO DIE! 若くして死ぬ
overview: After dying in a bus crash and falling to hell, high schooler Daisuke joins a demonic rock band so he can be reincarnated back into the mortal world.
